staff_rep_process.title: What Happens After You File a Grievance

steps.title: Area Office Review
steps.description: Your area office receives the grievance and assigns a staff representative.

steps.title: Staff Rep Assessment
steps.description: The staff rep reviews the grievance for merit and viability. They may contact you for additional information.

steps.title: Strategy Development
steps.description: If the grievance proceeds, the staff rep develops a strategy and may request additional documentation.

steps.title: Representation
steps.description: The staff rep represents the grievance at formal meetings and arbitration if necessary.

staff_rep_process.note: Staff rep assignment typically occurs within 5-10 business days of filing.
